arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: يَا أَيُّهَا الْمُزَّمِّلُ
english translation text:
O you wrapped up in your mantle!
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: قُمِ اللَّيْلَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا
english translation text:
Stand vigil through the night, except for a little [of it],
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: نِّصْفَهُ أَوِ انقُصْ مِنْهُ قَلِيلًا
english translation text:
a half, or reduce a little from that
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: أَوْ زِدْ عَلَيْهِ وَرَتِّلِ الْقُرْآنَ تَرْتِيلًا
english translation text:
or add to it, and recite the Quran in a measured tone.
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: إِنَّا سَنُلْقِي عَلَيْكَ قَوْلًا ثَقِيلًا
english translation text:
Indeed soon We shall cast on you a weighty discourse.
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ اللَّيْلِ هِيَ أَشَدُّ وَطْئًا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا
english translation text:
Indeed the watch of the night is firmer in tread and more upright in respect to speech,
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: إِنَّ لَكَ فِي النَّهَارِ سَبْحًا طَوِيلًا
english translation text:
for indeed during the day you have drawn-out engagements.
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: وَاذْكُرِ اسْمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلْ إِلَيْهِ تَبْتِيلًا
english translation text:
So celebrate the Name of your Lord and dedicate yourself to Him with total dedication.
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: رَّبُّ الْمَشْرِقِ وَالْمَغْرِبِ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَاتَّخِذْهُ وَكِيلًا
english translation text:
Lord of the east and the west, there is no god except Him; so take Him for your trustee,
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: وَاصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَاهْجُرْهُمْ هَجْرًا جَمِيلًا
english translation text:
and be patient over what they say, and distance yourself from them in a graceful manner.
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: وَذَرْنِي وَالْمُكَذِّبِينَ أُولِي النَّعْمَةِ وَمَهِّلْهُمْ قَلِيلًا
english translation text:
Leave Me [to deal] with the deniers, the opulent, and give them a little respite.
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: إِنَّ لَدَيْنَا أَنكَالًا وَجَحِيمًا
english translation text:
Indeed with Us are heavy fetters and a fierce fire,
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: وَطَعَامًا ذَا غُصَّةٍ وَعَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
english translation text:
and a food that chokes [those who eat it], and a painful punishment [prepared for]
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ الْأَرْضُ وَالْجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ الْجِبَالُ كَثِيبًا مَّهِيلًا
english translation text:
the day when the earth and the mountains will quake, and the mountains will be like dunes of shifting sand.
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَا إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًا شَاهِدًا عَلَيْكُمْ كَمَا أَرْسَلْنَا إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ رَسُولًا
english translation text:
Indeed We have sent to you an apostle, to be a witness to you, just as We sent an apostle to Pharaoh.
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: فَعَصَىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ الرَّسُولَ فَأَخَذْنَاهُ أَخْذًا وَبِيلًا
english translation text:
But Pharaoh disobeyed the apostle; so We seized him with a terrible seizing.
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًا يَجْعَلُ الْوِلْدَانَ شِيبًا
english translation text:
So, if you disbelieve, how will you avoid the day, which will make children white-headed,
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: السَّمَاءُ مُنفَطِرٌ بِهِ ۚ كَانَ وَعْدُهُ مَفْعُولًا
english translation text:
and wherein the sky will be rent apart? His promise is bound to be fulfilled.
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَاءَ اتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِ سَبِيلًا
english translation text:
This is indeed a reminder. So let anyone who wishes take the way toward his Lord.
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ تَقُومُ أَدْنَىٰ مِن ثُلُثَيِ اللَّيْلِ وَنِصْفَهُ وَثُلُثَهُ وَطَائِفَةٌ مِّنَ الَّذِينَ مَعَكَ ۚ وَاللَّهُ يُقَدِّرُ اللَّيْلَ وَالنَّهَارَ ۚ عَلِمَ أَن لَّن تُحْصُوهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ
english translation text:
Indeed your Lord knows that you stand vigil for nearly two thirds of the night—or [at times] a half or a third of it—along with a group of those who are with you. Allah measures the night and the day. He knows that you cannot calculate it [exactly], and so He was lenient toward you.
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: فَاقْرَءُوا مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ ۚ عَلِمَ أَن سَيَكُونُ مِنكُم مَّرْضَىٰ ۙ وَآخَرُونَ يَضْرِبُونَ فِي الْأَرْضِ يَبْتَغُونَ مِن فَضْلِ اللَّهِ ۙ وَآخَرُونَ يُقَاتِلُونَ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ ۖ فَاقْرَءُوا مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنْهُ ۚ
english translation text:
So recite as much of the Quran as is feasible. He knows that some of you will be sick, while others will travel in the land seeking Allah’s bounty, and yet others will fight in the way of Allah. So recite as much of it as is feasible,
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One

arabic text: وَأَقِيمُوا الصَّلَاةَ وَآتُوا الزَّكَاةَ وَأَقْرِضُوا اللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا ۚ وَمَا تُقَدِّمُوا لِأَنفُسِكُم مِّنْ خَيْرٍ تَجِدُوهُ عِندَ اللَّهِ هُوَ خَيْرًا وَأَعْظَمَ أَجْرًا ۚ وَاسْتَغْفِرُوا اللَّهَ ۖ إِنَّ اللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
english translation text:
and maintain the prayer and pay the zakat and lend Allah a good loan. Whatever good you send ahead for your souls you will find it with Allah [in a form] that is better and greater with respect to reward. And plead to Allah for forgiveness; indeed Allah is all-forgiving, all-merciful.
Al Muzzammil – The Enshrouded One
